window.title: Are you sure you want to change the skill at the cost of one Seal Stone? Once you confirm, you are unable to go back.

/c#00F7FF[Angel Gold introduction] /c*
 1. The items in the Item Mall should be traded with [/c#EEFF33Angel Gold/c*]. 
 2. Players can charge on official site [/c#EEFF33http://ao.igg.com/c*] and then change the charged points to [/c#EEFF33Angel Gold/c*]. 
 3. Angel Gold cannot be /c#EEFF33traded/c* or /c#EEFF33transfered/c* to other accounts. 
/c#00F7FF[Operation of the Mall Interface]/c*
 1. Click the /c#EEFF33Mall Icon/c*. 
 2. Items are classified into weapons, armor, functions, special, PD, potions, robot mounts and pets/c*.
 3. One kind of item can be traded every time.
 4. /c#00F7FFPurchase:/c* Click [/c#EEFF33Buy/c*] button after selecting the items, then confirm it at a cost of a certain amount of Angel Gold. The purchased item(s) will be placed in [/c#EEFF33Store Cabinet/c*].
 5. /c#00F7FFPresent:/c* Click the [/c#EEFF33Gift/c*] button after selecting items and enter the presentee's name.
 6. /c#00F7FFJoin my favorite/c*: Click [/c#EEFF33Add Favorite/c*] button, and the system will record it on your favorites page.
 7. On [Favorites] page, you can purchase, present or delete.
 8. You can remove the items from the [/c#EEFF33Store Cabinet/c*] and place them in your backpack. Make sure you have enough /c#EEFF33Loading/c* and /c#EEFF33Space/c*.
 9. Players cannot return any items in their backpack to the store cabinet.
10. 10 items at most can be displayed in the store cabinet once. Those left in the Cabinet will be displayed only after the previous ones are drawn out.
Are you sure you want to buy this item?
Are you sure you want to give \n/c#FFFF66[＊＊＊＊＊＊＊＊＊＊＊＊]/c*\n to /c#FF99FF player's name ＊＊/c*?
You have no right to set fortification
